Our Ministries

Conducting Pastors' Conferences

Training shepherds, renewing leaders, and strengthening those who serve.

Leadership Gathering

A conference table for
those who serve

Pastors carry the needs of villages, churches, and families. These gatherings create a focused place for teaching, prayer, and encouragement so leaders can return to the field with renewed strength.

A strengthened shepherd blesses the whole community. These gatherings create space for pastors to receive biblical teaching and practical counsel for the work God has placed in their hands.

Community Impact

Spiritual Unity

The Process

Four sessions,
one purpose

The conference is shaped around the needs of pastors who serve every week: teaching, renewal, vision, and fellowship.

01

Equipping Leaders

Training shepherds for effective ministry.

02

Leadership Renewal

Strengthening the hands of those who serve.

03

Sharpening Vision

Empowering pastors through biblical wisdom.

04

Stronger Together

Building a network of Kingdom leaders.

Inside The Room

Leaders receive the
fuel to keep serving.

01

Biblical sessions for pastors serving villages and local churches.

02

Prayer moments for personal renewal, courage, and fresh strength.

03

Fellowship that reminds leaders they are not carrying the work alone.

04

Practical counsel for shepherding families, believers, and new disciples.

When pastors are equipped,
churches become healthier.

Join us in strengthening the hands of those who serve the furthest villages.

Contact Ministry
✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh
Savior's Heartbeat
Ministries · Est. 1976

Preaching and Preparing People for HIS Coming. Serving communities across India with the transforming love of Jesus Christ since 1976.

“God Holy Spirit may touch you and speak to your heart to fulfill the Savior's Heartbeat.”
